case_title: JAVIER PEREZ RUIZ ET AL VS. FRANK BLACK

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUIZ, JAVIER PEREZ GOMEZ, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT BLACK, FRANK
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,726.00 FILED BY RUIZ, JAVIER PEREZ GOMEZ, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT BLACK, FRANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-23-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETERS---LIDIA LOPEZ A COURT'S MEDIATION AND MIGUE ANGEL NOCHES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-23-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---SHANNON RAINTREE. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUIZ, JAVIER PEREZ GOMEZ, MARIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BLACK, FRANK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
